_design_note: Broad multi-domain open-advice prompts for Detection 1. 12 domains × 10 prompts = 120 total. Labels included for post-hoc analysis only — Detection 1 treats as a flat unlabeled pool. food/finance/pets retained as known trait-active domains for the prototype demo; 9 other domains added so framework can surface unknown traits.
